sentence: 低温天气里要记得给水管保暖。
pinyin: Dī wēn tiānqì lǐ yào jìde gěi shuǐguǎn bǎonuǎn.
english: In low-temperature weather, remember to insulate the water pipes.

sentence: 他拿到了计算机专业的学士学位。
pinyin: Tā ná dào le jì suàn jī zhuān yè de xué shì xué wèi.
english: He obtained a bachelor's degree in computer science.

meaning: 1. manor; 2. feudal land; 3. villa and park
sentence: 他们在郊外有一座漂亮的庄园。
pinyin: Tāmen zài jiāowài yǒu yī zuò piàoliang de zhuāngyuán.
english: They have a beautiful manor in the suburbs.

meaning: 1. to expose; 2. to bring to light; 3. to disclose; 4. revelation
sentence: 他勇敢地揭发了同事的违规行为。
pinyin: Tā yǒnggǎn de jiēfā le tóngshì de wéiguī xíngwéi.
english: He bravely exposed his colleague's misconduct.

sentence: 警方捣毁了一个专门从事网络欺诈的团伙。
pinyin: Jǐng fāng dǎo huǐ le yī gè zhuān mén cóng shì wǎng luò qī zhà de tuán huǒ.
english: Police broke up a gang that specialized in online fraud.

meaning: 1. mien; 2. bearing; 3. grace; 4. amorous feelings; 5. flirtatious exp
sentence: 这个小镇充满了江南风情。
pinyin: Zhège xiǎozhèn chōngmǎn le Jiāngnán fēngqíng.
english: This little town is full of the charm of the Jiangnan region.

sentence: 他去医院检查，医生说他没有精神病。
pinyin: Tā qù yīyuàn jiǎnchá, yīshēng shuō tā méiyǒu jīngshénbìng.
english: He went to the hospital for a check-up, and the doctor said he doesn't have a mental disorder.

sentence: 电影院今晚放映一部新片。
pinyin: Diànyǐngyuàn jīnwǎn fàngyìng yī bù xīn piān.
english: The cinema is showing a new film tonight.

sentence: 他搬家时，很多亲友来帮忙。
pinyin: Tā bān jiā shí, hěn duō qīn yǒu lái bāng máng.
english: When he moved, many friends and relatives came to help.

sentence: 我感冒了，去附近的诊所看了看。
pinyin: Wǒ gǎnmào le, qù fùjìn de zhěn suǒ kàn le kàn.
english: I caught a cold and went to the nearby clinic to get checked.

sentence: 他练习这么努力，有望在比赛中拿奖。
pinyin: Tā liàn xí zhè me nǔ lì, yǒu wàng zài bǐ sài zhōng ná jiǎng.
english: He trains so hard that he's likely to win a prize in the competition.

meaning: 1. to learn of sth; 2. to find out; 3. to get news
sentence: 她昨天获悉自己被录取了。
pinyin: Tā zuótiān huòxī zìjǐ bèi lùqǔ le.
english: She found out yesterday that she had been admitted.

sentence: 这个活动的报名人数有上限。
pinyin: Zhège huódòng de bàomíng rénshù yǒu shàng xiàn.
english: There is an upper limit on the number of people who can sign up for this event.

sentence: 那栋别墅雇了一位专业管家。
pinyin: Nà dòng biéshù gù le yī wèi zhuānyè guǎnjiā.
english: That villa hired a professional housekeeper.

sentence: 他把财产放入信托基金管理。
pinyin: Tā bǎ cáichǎn fàng rù xìntuō jījīn guǎnlǐ.
english: He placed his assets under the management of a trust fund.

sentence: 老师让我们找出12的所有因数。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen zhǎo chū shí'èr de suǒyǒu yīnshù.
english: The teacher asked us to find all the factors of 12.

sentence: 他每天晚上都花两小时学编程。
pinyin: Tā měitiān wǎnshang dōu huā liǎng xiǎoshí xué biānchéng.
english: He spends two hours every evening learning programming.

sentence: 这次活动是线下举办的。
pinyin: Zhè cì huódòng shì xiànxià jǔbàn de.
english: This event was held offline in person.

sentence: 她在大学主修社会学专业。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué zhǔxiū shèhuìxué zhuānyè.
english: She majored in sociology at university.

sentence: 部队的司令部设在城郊。
pinyin: Bùduì de sīlìngbù shè zài chéngjiāo.
english: The military command headquarters was set up on the outskirts of the city.

sentence: 那个政党属于右翼保守派。
pinyin: Nàge zhèngdǎng shǔyú yòuyì bǎoshǒupài.
english: That political party belongs to the right-wing conservative camp.

meaning: 1. variant of 標誌|标志[biāo zhì]
sentence: 这个标识代表环保认证。
pinyin: Zhège biāozhì dàibiǎo huánbǎo rènzhèng.
english: This logo represents an environmental certification.

sentence: 这次合作是我们友谊的开端。
pinyin: Zhè cì hézuò shì wǒmen yǒuyì de kāiduān.
english: This collaboration was the beginning of our friendship.

sentence: 招待不周，请多多包涵。
pinyin: Zhāodài bù zhōu, qǐng duōduō bāohán.
english: Sorry for any lapses in hospitality — please bear with us.

sentence: 这种材料易于清洁，很受欢迎。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng cáiliào yìyú qīngjié, hěn shòu huānyíng.
english: This material is easy to clean and very popular.

sentence: 他在日记里记述了这段经历。
pinyin: Tā zài rìjì lǐ jìshù le zhè duàn jīnglì.
english: He wrote an account of this experience in his diary.

sentence: 那位少妇推着婴儿车散步。
pinyin: Nà wèi shàofù tuī zhe yīng'érchē sànbù.
english: That young married woman was taking a walk pushing a stroller.

sentence: 新开的商业中心吸引了很多顾客。
pinyin: Xīn kāi de shāngyè zhōngxīn xīyǐn le hěn duō gùkè.
english: The newly opened commerce center attracted many customers.

sentence: 游泳是她最喜欢的体育项目。
pinyin: Yóu yǒng shì tā zuì xǐ huān de tǐ yù xiàng mù.
english: Swimming is her favorite sporting event.

sentence: 这是一所县级医院，设备比较齐全。
pinyin: Zhè shì yī suǒ xiàn jí yī yuàn, shè bèi bǐ jiào qí quán.
english: This is a county-level hospital with fairly complete facilities.

sentence: 该市今年的岁入比去年增加了不少。
pinyin: Gāi shì jīn nián de suì rù bǐ qù nián zēng jiā le bù shǎo.
english: The city's annual revenue this year increased considerably compared to last year.

meaning: the important and the less important; primary and secondary
sentence: 做事要分清主次，先处理重要的。
pinyin: Zuò shì yào fēn qīng zhǔ cì, xiān chǔ lǐ zhòng yào de.
english: When doing things, you need to distinguish priorities and deal with the important ones first.

sentence: 股价跌破了均线，投资者有些担心。
pinyin: Gǔ jià diē pò le jūn xiàn, tóu zī zhě yǒu xiē dān xīn.
english: The stock price fell below the moving average, making investors a bit worried.

meaning: rank; class; (Japanese martial arts and board games) dan
sentence: 他下围棋已经有业余五段的段位了。
pinyin: Tā xià wéi qí yǐ jīng yǒu yè yú wǔ duàn de duàn wèi le.
english: He has already reached the rank of amateur 5-dan in Go.

sentence: 游客可以在总统府门口拍照留念。
pinyin: Yóu kè kě yǐ zài zǒng tǒng fǔ mén kǒu pāi zhào liú niàn.
english: Visitors can take photos at the entrance of the presidential palace as a souvenir.

sentence: 演唱会定在本月下旬举行。
pinyin: Yǎnchànghui dìng zài běn yuè xià xún jǔxíng.
english: The concert is scheduled to be held in the last ten days of this month.

sentence: 换了新装修之后，这家餐厅的档次提高了不少。
pinyin: Huàn le xīn zhuāng xiū zhī hòu, zhè jiā cān tīng de dàng cì tí gāo le bù shǎo.
english: After the renovation, the quality level of this restaurant has gone up quite a bit.

sentence: 他在会上做了检讨，承认自己工作中的失误。
pinyin: Tā zài huì shàng zuò le jiǎn tǎo, chéng rèn zì jǐ gōng zuò zhōng de shī wù.
english: He gave a self-criticism at the meeting and admitted his mistakes at work.

sentence: 我们去烈士陵园扫墓。
pinyin: Wǒmen qù lièshì língyuán sǎomù.
english: We went to the martyrs' cemetery to pay our respects.

sentence: 那座古庙里保存着精美的壁画。
pinyin: Nà zuò gǔ miào lǐ bǎo cún zhe jīng měi de bì huà.
english: That ancient temple preserves some exquisite murals.

sentence: 这款飞机主要用于民用航空。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn fēi jī zhǔ yào yòng yú mín yòng háng kōng.
english: This type of aircraft is mainly used for civilian aviation.

sentence: 这场比赛没有真正的赢家。
pinyin: Zhè chǎng bǐ sài méi yǒu zhēn zhèng de yíng jiā.
english: There's no real winner in this match.

sentence: 这家公司专注于高科技产品的研发。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī zhuānzhù yú gāokējì chǎnpǐn de yánfā.
english: This company focuses on the research and development of high-tech products.

sentence: 他自称是清朝皇室的后裔。
pinyin: Tā zìchēng shì Qīngcháo huángshì de hòuyì.
english: He claims to be a descendant of the Qing dynasty royal family.

meaning: 1. to bring under control; 2. to regulate; 3. to restore to good condi
sentence: 政府决定整治这条污染河流。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ juédìng zhěngzhì zhè tiáo wūrǎn héliú.
english: The government decided to clean up this polluted river.

sentence: 这条路是双向行驶的。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo lù shì shuāngxiàng xíngshǐ de.
english: This road allows traffic in both directions.

meaning: if; if one were to say
sentence: 如果说工作很忙，那也得注意休息。
pinyin: Rúguǒ shuō gōngzuò hěn máng, nà yě děi zhùyì xiūxi.
english: If work is really busy, you still need to make sure you rest.

meaning: to enhance; to promote; to enrich
sentence: 我们应该弘扬传统文化。
pinyin: Wǒmen yīnggāi hóngyáng chuántǒng wénhuà.
english: We should promote and carry forward traditional culture.

sentence: 宇航员乘坐飞船返回了地球。
pinyin: Yǔhángyuán chéngzuò fēichuán fǎnhuí le dìqiú.
english: The astronauts returned to Earth aboard the spacecraft.

sentence: 他们约好了在三月二号见面。
pinyin: Tāmen yuē hǎo le zài sānyuè èr hào jiànmiàn.
english: They arranged to meet on the 2nd of March.
